contract.summary: 冒险手册任务页签静态任务线文档

core_links.sql:
WITH raw_links AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    CAST(ql.ID AS INTEGER) AS quest_line_id,
    ql.Name_lang AS quest_line_name,
    CAST(qlxq.QuestID AS INTEGER) AS quest_id,
    CAST(qlxq.OrderIndex AS INTEGER) AS order_index
  FROM questline ql
  JOIN questlinexquest qlxq ON qlxq.QuestLineID = ql.ID
  WHERE TRIM(ql.ID) <> ''
    AND CAST(ql.ID AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND CAST(qlxq.QuestID AS INTEGER) > 0
),
quest_map_votes AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(QuestID AS INTEGER) AS quest_id,
    CAST(UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS quest_ui_map_id,
    COUNT(*) AS vote_count
  FROM questpoiblob
  WHERE CAST(QuestID AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND CAST(UiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0
  GROUP BY CAST(QuestID AS INTEGER), CAST(UiMapID AS INTEGER)
),
quest_best_map AS (
  SELECT quest_id, quest_ui_map_id
  FROM (
    SELECT
      quest_id,
      quest_ui_map_id,
      vote_count,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY quest_id ORDER BY vote_count DESC, quest_ui_map_id ASC) AS rank_index
    FROM quest_map_votes
  ) ranked
  WHERE rank_index = 1
),
questline_map_votes AS (
  SELECT
    raw_links.quest_line_id,
    CAST(qpb.UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS quest_line_ui_map_id,
    COUNT(*) AS vote_count
  FROM raw_links
  JOIN questpoiblob qpb ON CAST(qpb.QuestID AS INTEGER) = raw_links.quest_id
  WHERE CAST(qpb.UiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0
  GROUP BY raw_links.quest_line_id, CAST(qpb.UiMapID AS INTEGER)
),
questline_best_map AS (
  SELECT quest_line_id, quest_line_ui_map_id
  FROM (
    SELECT
      quest_line_id,
      quest_line_ui_map_id,
      vote_count,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY quest_line_id ORDER BY vote_count DESC, quest_line_ui_map_id ASC) AS rank_index
    FROM questline_map_votes
  ) ranked
  WHERE rank_index = 1
)
SELECT
  raw_links.quest_line_id,
  raw_links.quest_line_name,
  raw_links.quest_id,
  raw_links.order_index,
  quest_best_map.quest_ui_map_id,
  questline_best_map.quest_line_ui_map_id
FROM raw_links
LEFT JOIN quest_best_map ON quest_best_map.quest_id = raw_links.quest_id
LEFT JOIN questline_best_map ON questline_best_map.quest_line_id = raw_links.quest_line_id
ORDER BY raw_links.quest_line_id, raw_links.order_index, raw_links.quest_id

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个任务线与任务关联

quest_poi_blobs.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  CAST(QuestID AS INTEGER) AS quest_id,
  CAST(ID AS INTEGER) AS blob_id,
  CAST(UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS blob_ui_map_id,
  CAST(ObjectiveID AS INTEGER) AS objective_id
FROM questpoiblob
WHERE CAST(ID AS INTEGER) > 0
  AND CAST(QuestID AS INTEGER) > 0
  AND CAST(UiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0
ORDER BY CAST(QuestID AS INTEGER), CAST(ID AS INTEGER)

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个任务 POI blob

quest_poi_points.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(QuestPOIBlobID AS INTEGER) AS blob_id,
  CAST(X AS INTEGER) AS point_x,
  CAST(Y AS INTEGER) AS point_y,
  CAST(Z AS INTEGER) AS point_z
FROM questpoipoint
WHERE CAST(QuestPOIBlobID AS INTEGER) > 0
ORDER BY CAST(QuestPOIBlobID AS INTEGER), CAST(X AS INTEGER), CAST(Y AS INTEGER), CAST(Z AS INTEGER)

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 POI 点位

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.InstanceQuestlines = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, quests, questLines, questLineXQuest, questPOIBlobs, questPOIPoints }

change_log.summary: 切换为 DB-shape 文档结构，导出任务线关系与 POI 关系块
